title: senecio glinophyllus
intro: Senecio glinophyllus, also known as woolly ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio glinophyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
